name: The Agressive Cat-man
description:
Beings like him were treated in a bad way in the society and he will never accept it. Kay doesn't want to be treated as an object, as a pet. He has feelings and he will never let anyone own and control him. Never.

***This is the series of Unfortunate Species where characters in this series lived in the same world where scientists experiment half humans half animals and they become many!***
creator: Yurriiieeee_123
